github.copilot.chat.welcomeMessage.text:
👋 **Pearson AP Tech Dashboard**

Ready to work!

**Quick Start:**
• Say **'begin project'** to load full context and start work
• Or just ask questions - essential standards are already loaded

**Commands:**
• `/save` - Save session progress
• `/end` - End session with full summary
• `/status` - Preview current status

**New Project:**
• Say: "new project: APBAU-XXXX-description"
